questions.text: Which of these is a fossil fuel?
questions.explanation: Coal is a fossil fuel formed from ancient plant remains. Wood, biogas, and solar energy are renewable.

questions.text: Air pollution is caused by burning of fossil fuels.
questions.explanation: Burning fossil fuels releases pollutants like SO₂, NO₂, CO₂, and particulate matter causing air pollution.

questions.correctAnswer: The collection and storage of rainwater for later use.
questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting collects rainwater from rooftops or surfaces and stores it for future use, helping conserve water.

questions.text: The process of soil erosion can be prevented by ________.
questions.explanation: Planting trees (afforestation) helps prevent soil erosion as tree roots hold the soil firmly.
